accurate.why: All claims are supported by the resolution text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; description of the Congressional Review Act process is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: nullifying the FHWA's Buy America waiver rule for EV chargers.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains the resolution would render the FHWA rule of no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution has no material exceptions.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the Senate passage date (November 8, 2023) and notes disapproval would apply immediately upon enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision: disapproval and nullification of the FHWA rule.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies FHWA, the Federal Register citation, and chapter 8 of title 5.

correct_figures.why: 88 Fed. Reg. 10619 and February 21, 2023 are correctly stated.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
